title: Section 8
content: Duties of 1[State Board for Wild Life]-- It shall be the duty of 1[State Board for Wild Life] to advise the State Government,-- 2[(a) in the selection and management of areas to be declared as protected areas;] 3[(b) in formulation of the policy for protection and conservation of the wild life and specified plants;] (c) in any matter relating to the amendment of any Schedule; 4*** 5[(cc) in relation to the measures to be taken for harmonising the needs of the tribals and other dwellers of the forest with the protection and conservation of wild life; and] (d) in any other matter connected with the protection of wild life, which may bereferred to it by the State Government.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 16 of 2003, s. 8, for "the Wild Life Advisory Board" (w.e.f. 1-4-2003). 2. Subs. by s. 8, ibid., for clause (a) (w.e.f. 1-4-2003). 3. Subs. by Act 44 of 1991, s. 8, for clause (b) (w.e.f. 2-10-1991). 4. The word "and" omitted by s. 8, ibid. (w.e.f. 2-10-1991). 5. Ins. by s. 8, ibid. (w.e.f. 2-10-1991).
